vulnerability.reference: Researchers trust LLM evaluators as objective, neglecting their biases and miscalibrations.
vulnerability.generated: Researchers depend on automated evaluations without robust bias detection, leaving them unable to identify miscalibrated assessments.

impact.reference: Misguided research priorities and resource allocation based on inflated performance metrics.
impact.generated: Distorted benchmark rankings mislead progress comparisons, causing misallocation of research effort and flawed agent improvements.

dose_response.reference: Miscalibrated, biased evaluators enable inflated performance metrics, which when researchers trust them as objective distorts benchmark results, leading to misguided research priorities and resource allocation.
dose_response.generated: Miscalibrated, biased agent evaluators, through AI researchers using them to judge code generation agents, trigger reliance on undetected biases, leading to distorted benchmarks that mislead progress comparisons and misallocate research effort.
